summary: TRD v2.0 with multi-tenant architecture, Razorpay Route integration (auto-split 85/15), subdomain provisioning system, referral system database schema and real-time WebSocket logic, step journey state machine, GA4 per-customer property API automation, monthly/annual billing via Razorpay Subscriptions, animation tech stack (Framer Motion + GSAP + Three.js), and SaaS-level design system specifications.
